tickets.title: Payment Declined During Checkout
tickets.description: Customer attempted to purchase a premium plan but the payment keeps getting declined despite sufficient balance on the card.

tickets.title: Profile Picture Not Updating
tickets.description: User uploads a new profile picture but the previous image still appears after refreshing the page.

tickets.title: Password Reset Email Not Received
tickets.description: Customer requested a password reset but the email is not arriving even after checking spam and junk folders.

tickets.title: Dashboard Loading Very Slowly
tickets.description: User reports that the dashboard takes more than 30 seconds to load after logging into the system.

tickets.title: Unable to Update Billing Address
tickets.description: Customer tried to update their billing address but the save button does not store the new information.

tickets.title: Notification Emails Stopped
tickets.description: Customer reports that system notification emails are no longer arriving after a recent account update.

tickets.title: File Upload Fails for Large Documents
tickets.description: User cannot upload PDF documents larger than 10MB even though the system documentation states that 25MB is supported.

tickets.title: Mobile Layout Overlapping Content
tickets.description: Customer reports that some buttons overlap text on smaller mobile screens when viewing the account settings page.

tickets.title: Subscription Upgrade Not Reflected
tickets.description: Customer upgraded from Basic to Pro plan but the account dashboard still shows the Basic plan features.

tickets.title: Search Feature Returning No Results
tickets.description: Customer reports that the search bar returns empty results even when searching for items that definitely exist.
